obtain ⟨τ, hτ, hτ'⟩ := hX
  have h₁ : ∀ n, ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, Function.RightContinuous (stoppedProcess (fun i ↦ {ω | ⊥ < τ n ω}.indicator (X i)) (τ n) · ω) := hτ'
  have h₂ : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, Tendsto (τ · ω) atTop (𝓝 ⊤) := hτ.tendsto_top
  have h₃ : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, Monotone (τ · ω) := hτ.mono
  filter_upwards [h₂, h₃] with ω hω₂ hω₃
  intro t
  have h₄ : ∃ n, t < τ n ω := by
    rw [WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff] at hω₂
    obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ := hω₂ t
    exact ⟨n, hn⟩
  obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ := h₄
  have h₅ : Function.RightContinuous (stoppedProcess (fun i ↦ {ω | ⊥ < τ n ω}.indicator (X i)) (τ n) · ω) := h₁ n ω
  have h₆ : ∀ i, stoppedProcess (fun i ↦ {ω | ⊥ < τ n ω}.indicator (X i)) (τ n) i ω = if τ n ω ≤ i then X (τ n ω) ω else X i ω := by
    simp [stoppedProcess]
  have h₇ : τ n ω > t := hn
  have h₈ : ∀ᶠ s in 𝓝[≥] t, s < τ n ω := by
    exact (gt_mem_nhds h₇).mono (fun s hs => le_of_lt hs)
  refine Function.RightContinuous.of_nhds fun s hs =>
    have h₉ : s < τ n ω := h₈ hs
    rw [h₆ s, h₆ t, if_neg (not_le_of_gt h₉), if_neg (not_le_of_gt h₇)]
    exact h₅ s hs

obtain ⟨τ, hτ, hstop⟩ := hX
  filter_upwards [hτ.tendsto_top] with ω hω
  have hmono : Monotone (τ · ω) := hτ.mono.mp (by aesop) ω
  have hright : ∀ n, Function.RightContinuous (fun i ↦ if ⊥ < τ n ω then X i ω else 0) := hstop n
  refine Function.RightContinuous.of_tendsto_atTop hω ?_
  intro n
  have hle : τ n ω ≤ τ (n + 1) ω := hmono (Nat.le_succ n)
  have hlt : τ n ω < ⊤ := (WithTop.lt_top_iff_ne_top.2 <| fun h ↦ by
    rw [h] at hω
    exact absurd hω (not_tendsto_const_nhds_top _))
  cases' lt_or_eq_of_le hle with hlt' heq
  · have : (fun i ↦ if ⊥ < τ n ω then X i ω else 0) =ᶠ[𝓝[≥] (τ n ω)] fun i ↦ X i ω := by
      apply Filter.eventuallyEq_of_mem
      refine Ici_mem_Ici (τ n ω)
      intro i hi
      simp [Set.indicator_apply, hlt.ne]
    exact this.mono_right (Function.RightContinuous.mono_right (hright n))
  · subst heq
    have : (fun i ↦ if ⊥ < τ n ω then X i ω else 0) =ᶠ[𝓝[≥] (τ n ω)] fun i ↦ X i ω := by
      apply Filter.eventuallyEq_of_mem
      refine Ici_mem_Ici (τ n ω)
      intro i hi
      simp [Set.indicator_apply, hlt.ne]
    exact this.mono_right (Function.RightContinuous.mono_right (hright n))

have h := hX.stoppedProcess
  have h' := hX.IsLocalizingSequence.tendsto_top
  filter_upwards [h', hX.IsLocalizingSequence.mono] with ω hω hmono
  have hseq := hX.localSeq
  have hstop := hX.IsLocalizingSequence.isStoppingTime
  have hprop := hX.stoppedProcess
  specialize hprop 0
  simp only [stoppedProcess, Set.indicator] at hprop
  have htop : ∀ i, hseq 0 ω = ⊤ → X i ω = (Set.indicator {ω | ⊥ < hseq 0 ω} (X i)) ω := by
    intro i htop
    simp [htop]
  have hcont := hprop ω
  have hlim := hω
  rw [WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff] at hlim
  have hright : Function.RightContinuous (X · ω) := by
    intro t
    have hlt := hlim t
    obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := hlt
    have hN' := hmono 0 N (Nat.zero_le _)
    have hseqN : hseq N ω ≥ hseq 0 ω := hN'
    have hseqN' : hseq N ω = ⊤ := by
      rw [ge_iff_le] at hseqN
      exact WithTop.eq_top_of_ge_top hseqN
    have hcontN := hX.stoppedProcess N ω
    simp only [stoppedProcess, Set.indicator] at hcontN
    have hcontN' : Function.RightContinuous (fun x ↦ if ⊥ < hseq N ω then X x ω else 0) := hcontN
    simp [hseqN'] at hcontN'
    exact hcontN'
  exact hright

  intro t ht

have h := hX.stoppedProcess
  refine ae_of_all _ fun ω ↦ ?_
  have hmono := hX.IsLocalizingSequence.mono

obtain ⟨τ, hτ, hτ'⟩ := hX
  have h₁ : ∀ n, ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, Function.RightContinuous (stoppedProcess (fun i ↦ {ω | ⊥ < τ n ω}.indicator (X i)) (τ n) · ω) :=
    fun n ↦ hτ' n
  have h₂ : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, Tendsto (τ · ω) atTop (𝓝 ⊤) := hτ.tendsto_top
  have h₃ : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, Monotone (τ · ω) := hτ.mono
  filter_upwards [h₂, h₃] with ω hω₂ hω₃
  intro t
  have h₄ : ∃ n, t < τ n ω := by
    rw [WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff] at hω₂
    obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := hω₂ t
    use N
    exact hN N le_rfl
  obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ := h₄
  have h₅ : ∀ i, i ≤ t → stoppedProcess (fun i ↦ {ω | ⊥ < τ n ω}.indicator (X i)) (τ n) i ω = X i ω := by
    intro i hi
    rw [stoppedProcess, Set.indicator_of_mem]
    · rfl
    · simp only [lt_of_le_of_lt hi hn]
  have h₆ : Function.RightContinuous (stoppedProcess (fun i ↦ {ω | ⊥ < τ n ω}.indicator (X i)) (τ n) · ω) := (h₁ n) ω
  exact h₆.of_eq_on_Iic h₅
